label: GAIA Voice
info:
Gestione comandi vocali GAIA.
Importa: Menu → Import → seleziona questo file.
Dopo import: aggiorna il broker MQTT nei nodi mqtt in/out con il tuo broker esistente.

func:
return { topic: 'gaia/device/' + msg.device_id + '/command',
         payload: JSON.stringify({ action: 'enable', service: 'yolo' }) };

name: Disable YOLO
func:
return { topic: 'gaia/device/' + msg.device_id + '/command',
         payload: JSON.stringify({ action: 'disable', service: 'yolo' }) };

name: Enable MediaPipe
func:
return { topic: 'gaia/device/' + msg.device_id + '/command',
         payload: JSON.stringify({ action: 'enable', service: 'mediapipe' }) };

name: Disable MediaPipe
func:

         payload: JSON.stringify({ action: 'disable', service: 'mediapipe' }) };

name: Enable Voice
func:

name: Disable Voice

         payload: JSON.stringify({ action: 'disable', service: 'voice' }) };
